title: Minecards [Forge]
description: Over 100 cards to collect and trade! Forge edition.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1100/397/banner-png.png)

📜 Features 📜

Minecards aims to add a variety of collectible cards based on Minecraft content.   🢂 Over 100 different cards across several themed sets to collect, with varying in-world methods of obtaining.
Spoiler

The Overworld set (25 cards) - Found from chest pools in the overworld

The Nether set (13 cards) - Found from chest pools in the nether

The End set (13 cards) - Found from chest pools in the end/stronghold

The Aquatic set (13 cards) - Found from fishing

The Deep and Dark set (13 cards) - Found in underground chests (ancient city, mineshaft, etc.)

The Village and Pillage set (13 cards) - Found in villages and illager structures, and sold by the card collector villager.

The Retro set (19 cards) - Found via archaeology, and rarely in most chests.

Golden cards - given as rewards for collecting a full set of cards.

Other cards - a collection of random cards found from any card box.

🢂 Cards can be found in varying condition qualities, and even exist in foil form!
Spoiler

🢂 A new villager profession: the Card Collector! The Card Collector sells card packs. **Its work station is the Card Collector's Bench.**
Spoiler

The Card Collector's Bench is crafted with one Deckite - an ore found in the overworld - and one plank.

The Card Collector's Bench can be placed and taken as a profession block by a villager:

🢂 A few advancements to help you track your collection and grant rewards!
Spoiler

Gold cards are obtained by collecting every card in a set - in any quality or foil. Each one can only be obtained once per player. A foil gold card is available for collecting a full set in foil.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1100/399/separator-png.png)

❓ Help, Bug Reporting and Info ❓

Ask for help and report bugs ___**in the appropriate channels (help / report-bugs)**___ in my Discord Server   The above description applies to the latest version of the mod. Some features may not be present or may be different in older versions.   See gallery for all images. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1100/399/separator-png.png)
